summary: Phase 5B Crypto Sniper Dashboard Integration - All tests passed. Backend: 22/22 tests (100%). Frontend: 16/16 tests (100%). All features verified working.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/strategies/sniper/signals - Returns 200 with correct structure (tradable, rejected, total_tradable, total_rejected)
GET /api/strategies/sniper/executions - Returns 200 with active and completed lists
GET /api/strategies/sniper/health - Returns 200 with full health data
Health contains config (scan_interval, min_edge_bps, min_liquidity, min_confidence, etc.)
Health contains price_buffer_sizes for BTC and ETH
Regression: GET /api/status shows 'Crypto Sniper' in strategies
Regression: GET /api/config shows crypto_sniper strategy config
frontend_ui_tests: Sidebar shows 7 navigation items in correct order
Sniper nav item positioned between Arbitrage and Positions
Sniper nav item has Crosshair icon
6 stat cards displayed (Tradable, Rejected, Executed, Filled, Markets Classified, Scan Latency)
Tab switching works - Signals tab shows sniper-signals-table
Tab switching works - Rejected tab shows sniper-rejected-table
Tab switching works - Executions tab shows sniper-exec-table
Health tab shows Volatility section with BTC/ETH vol, sample counts, vol floor
Health tab shows Scanner Metrics section with 11 metrics
Health tab shows Rejection Reasons section
Health tab shows Scanner Config section
All existing pages still work (Overview, Arbitrage, Positions, Risk, Markets, Settings)
WebSocket stays connected during page navigation (single global WS)

seed_data_creation: None - uses existing engine state and API responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5B Sniper Dashboard Integration complete. Frontend page at /sniper shows 6 stat cards, 4 tabs, and Health tab has 4 sections. All data-testids in place for automated testing: sniper-page, stat-sniper-*, section-sniper-*, sniper-*-table, nav-sniper. Backend sniper APIs at /api/strategies/sniper/signals, /executions, /health all working. 6-second REST hydration interval configured in Sniper.jsx useEffect. Global WebSocket in AppShell.jsx - no additional connections created by Sniper page.
